title: Otholobium racemosum
taxonomy: Otholobium racemosum belongs to the family Fabaceae. This classification places it within the legume family, which includes a wide variety of flowering plants. The genus Otholobium is a relatively small group of plants, with many species found in southern Africa. Otholobium racemosum is a species of flowering plant native to South Africa. It is often classified based on its botanical characteristics, such as leaf shape and flower arrangement.
